Package org.solenopsis.soap.tooling

Class IndustriesManufacturingSettings2

java.lang.Object
org.solenopsis.soap.tooling.SObject
org.solenopsis.soap.tooling.IndustriesManufacturingSettings2
public class IndustriesManufacturingSettings2 extends SObject

Java class for IndustriesManufacturingSettings complex type

.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class.


 <complexType name="IndustriesManufacturingSettings">
   <complexContent>
     <extension base="{urn:sobject.tooling.soap.sforce.com}sObject">
       <sequence>
         <element name="DurableId" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="FullName" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsIndManufacturingEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsIndustriesMfgAccountForecastEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsIndustriesMfgAdvForecastEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsIndustriesMfgIasEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsIndustriesMfgProgramEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsIndustriesMfgTargetsEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsPartnerLeadManagementEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsPartnerPerformanceManagementEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsPartnerVisitManagementEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Metadata" type="{urn:metadata.tooling.soap.sforce.com}IndustriesManufacturingSettings" minOccurs="0"/>
       </sequence>
     </extension>
   </complexContent>
 </complexType>
